Title: Gives state residents reservation preference for state parks and recreational facilities
Summary: Gives state residents reservation preference for state parks and recreational facilities.
LawSection: Parks, Recreation and Historic Preservation Law
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the parks, recreation and historic preservation law, in relation to giving state residents reservation preference for state parks and recreational facilities
